name: ppm-risk-review
description: Family-office-grade due diligence on a Private Placement Memorandum or other private-fund offering document. Produces a CIO risk memo (with industry benchmarking, a pro-forma Risk-Radar stress test against historical norms, an uncertainty map, and a post-close monitoring protocol), sponsor diligence questionnaire, and plain-English summary in Markdown (Word optional on request), and ingests any linked YouTube deal-review video transcript as corroborating evidence.
